raw_consumer_statement: I purchased on XX/XX/year> with my XXXX XXXX Barclays XXXX XXXX ending on XXXX on the XXXX website with a total amount of {$1100.00}. I opened an investigation with XXXX, and they refused to help me, so I contacted my bank and asked for help because I never received my package, and they started an investigation. Yesterday I logged in on the app and I saw that they closed the investigation in XXXX 's favor. XXXX called me several weeks ago for the investigation, and they told me XXXX filed a claim and that they got their money back. I hate that the people in customer service at Barclays are located in another country, and you can't even understand. Now I'm here without my money, my items, and XXXX got the money back from Barclays, and also the money back from the XXXX claim.
